_optimization_results.notes: Balanced aggressive: More trades (RSI 38/62), larger positions (18%), higher leverage (27x). Better returns AND better risk metrics.

_profit_protection_update.purpose: Prevent green-to-red scenarios - exit if profit drops significantly from peak
_profit_protection_update.behavior: Once profit > 4% of invested amount (balance × position_size_pct), exit if profit drops from peak. Tightens over time: 40% (0-30min), then decreases 5% every 10 minutes: 40%→35%→30%→25%→20%→15% (minimum)
_profit_protection_update.impact: Activates at ~$30 profit on $8,274 balance with 9% position size, prevents massive missed profits
_profit_protection_update.example: Peak profit $172 at 25min -> exit at $103 (40% drop). Peak $172 at 45min -> exit at $129 (35% drop). Peak $172 at 85min -> exit at $146 (15% drop)
_profit_protection_update.replaces: Old trailing stop mechanism - profit protection is simpler and more effective
_profit_protection_update.time_based_tightening: Encourages taking profits on long-held positions, prevents holding losers too long
_profit_protection_update.continuous_protection: Checks every second (not just on candle close) to catch intra-candle swings

_adaptive_volatility_update.purpose: Reduce stop loss in high volatility to limit losses when ATR spikes
_adaptive_volatility_update.behavior: When ATR > 80th percentile (high volatility): reduce multiplier from 2.0x to 1.5x (25% reduction)
_adaptive_volatility_update.impact: Limits losses in volatile markets while maintaining optimal performance in normal conditions
_adaptive_volatility_update.rationale: When volatility spikes, ATR increases, widening stop loss → larger losses. Adaptive multiplier prevents this.

_loss_backoff_update.purpose: Prevent catching falling knife - exponential backoff after consecutive losses
_loss_backoff_update.behavior: Increases cooldown after losses: 1st=10min, 2nd=30min, 3rd=70min, 4th+=150min. Resets on win.
_loss_backoff_update.impact: +26.5% profit improvement in M1 backtest, gives market time to stabilize during strong downtrends
_loss_backoff_update.rationale: When price drops fast, RSI gets oversold repeatedly. Bot enters, hits SL, enters again. Backoff prevents accumulating losses.
_loss_backoff_update.note: M5 uses 5-minute candles, so multipliers apply to 10-minute base cooldown (2 candles * 5 min)
